Chat InputCompound

Full-width chat input with toolbar, auto-growing textarea, underline indicator, mic button, and send button state transitions.

RestFocusedText Entered

Chat Input — Interactive Preview

Click the input area and start typing. The component transitions between Rest, Focus, and Entered states automatically.
Try pasting a long prompt to see multiline behavior.
